p_countries_index: These are the countries where Bitsika is used the most. The virtual Visa card makes everyday digital payments easy, while KYC approval within an hour ensures quick and convenient access. Users can also top up with crypto for fast and flexible funding.

The virtual Visa card handles day-to-day digital payments smoothly, fast KYC approval within an hour ensures users get verified quickly, and crypto top-ups make funding quick and flexible.
